hero.tagline: Your trusted hotel booking platform connecting guests directly with hotel owners for the best deals and experiences.

cards.title: Smart Booking
cards.description: Direct prices, real‑time availability, and a seamless booking experience.

cards.title: Hotel Owner Tools
cards.description: Manage rooms, bookings, and pricing with a powerful dashboard.

cards.title: Instant Confirmation
cards.description: Immediate confirmation for guests and instant notifications for owners.

reviews.name: Lina Mansour
reviews.text: The booking process was incredibly smooth and the interface feels premium.

reviews.name: Hadi Nasser
reviews.text: I found great hotel deals that I couldn't find anywhere else. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Emily Carter
reviews.text: Fast, reliable, and beautifully designed. This platform is now my go‑to for hotel reservations.

about.title: About Us
about.paragraph1: Velvet Compass is a next‑generation hotel booking platform designed to connect travelers directly with hotel owners. Our mission is to deliver a seamless, transparent, and personalized booking experience.
about.paragraph2: Since 2026, we've grown into a trusted name in the hospitality industry, empowering both guests and hotel owners with modern, efficient tools.

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.subtext: Have questions or need assistance? We're here to help!
